creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
Hi,

as a port maintainer I am getting daily emails from pkg-fallout about inability to build www/forgejo7 in quarterly. This is due to the fact that www/forgejo7 needs at least go 1.22.7, while version in 2024Q4 is 1.22.6.

Is it possible to bump lang/go122 to 1.22.7 in quarterly? Or should www/forgejo7 be downgraded to previous version in quarterly? Or should I redirect those mails to /dev/null until 2025Q1?

Thank you in advance,
